rankedFindings.headline: 95% MMLU accuracy with 3x fewer params
rankedFindings.detail: First open model to match GPT-4

connections.narrativeHook: The last time an open-source project grew this fast, it became Docker

angles: contrarian: why this matters more than GPT-5
historical: the Docker parallel nobody sees
unusualFact: The model was trained on 10% of GPT-4's compute budget
